identity.name: ZERO Cocktail Bar, Tasting Room & Bottle Shop

narrative.summary: Non-alcoholic cocktail program with a tasting-room + bottle-shop angle; good ratings and open now (easy weeknight).

blocks.title: The Space
blocks.body: You're on a quiet Carlton stretch in the Garden District, and ZERO looks more like someone's well-stocked living room than a bar. Inside, it's part tasting counter, part retail shelves lined with non-alcoholic spirits and mixers, part dining setup where Chef Ling runs a tight operation. Gail holds court here, walking you through samples with the ease of a sommelier who's actually interested in what you think.

blocks.title: The Food
blocks.body: The menu leans Caribbean and pan-Asian, with Chef Ling turning out sharply executed plates that don't announce themselves as 'health food' just because the drinks are booze-free. The shark and bake—fried fish on pillowy fry bread—lands crispy and hot, while shrimp dumplings come properly translucent and delicate. Save room for the coconut mango crème brûlée, which cracks under your spoon like it should. It's dinner for two with cocktails, not a quick bite—plan on settling in.

blocks.title: Go When
blocks.body: Book a weeknight when you want something different but don't want to feel like you're making a statement about not drinking. Or come solo on a slower evening and let Gail walk you through the bottle shop—you'll leave with something good and an hour's worth of stories you didn't expect.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Amazing experience overall at Zero Cocktail Bar. We booked with Chef Ling for dinner and got to enjoy cocktails and an insane meal. Service was fantastic, food was incredible. Our favourites were the shark and bake, shrimp dumplings and the coconut mango crème brûlée. We'll be back soon for sure!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "What a gem! You must come and experience this place. Gail, the proprietor of this tasting shop, is full of wisdom, energy, and story. We went off of a recommendation on a mission to find a good non-alcohol cocktail, because we were striking out shopping online… wow were we surprised and impressed at what we found. Not only did Gail sample many AMAZING drinks, but gave a ton of backstory and nuance to each, as well as some history of herself at the same time. 1.5hrs flew by, and we were on our way with some amazing options. My fav was the CROSSIP line - we came home with two bottles (pure hibiscus and fresh citrus). FYI - we still enjoy alcohol drinks, but continue to add more and more non-alc options in as the quality improves and variety continues to grow. Gail seems to be at the front of this wave. Go check her out."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Walked by this spot on a walk down Carlton. The proprietor was so friendly and offered great recommendations - even my partner who is not a zero proof person was impressed. The interior was very well decorated and had a great, welcoming vibe. Strongly recommend folks to give this place a shot ! Great place to pick up some phony negronis as well."
